creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Created attachment 167929
patch

Added:    LibDorrit WebSocket library added to package.

Added:    Drood now sends the "Vary: Accept-Encoding" response line 
          with every response.

Modified: Cleaned up clear_conn() in drood and free_headers() in
          humdinger.

Modified: Made drood's detection of gzip accept header lines
          slightly more reliable.

Modified: Corrected bug that caused humdinger to not add the 
          "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block" header line after support
          for droodpipe was added.
